title: 50m Garden Twistee Tie, 164ft Plant Twist Tie Wire with Dispenser and Cutter for Gardening, Tomato, Vines, Shrubs and Flowers, Great for Organising, DIY Craft Projects (Garden Wire, 50 Metres)
features: 🌿🌱🌴💐 GREAT FOR SUPPORTING PLANTS & MORE- This Twistee Garden Wire is covered with durable plastic, making it ideal for securing plants in the garden. The garden wire is complete with dispenser and a cutter. Each pack contains 50 metres of wire. Great for supporting, tying and fixing just about anything! Great for organising headphone cables, USB cables, charger cables and many other uses for DIY and craft projects

🌿🌱🌴💐 IDEAL FOR TRAINING PLANTS - Great for training and supporting young plants. Easy to secure with just a twist (no need for fiddly knots) and can be easily cut with integrated wire cutter. With a couple of quick twists, the tie may be quickly and easily adjusted to accommodate growing stems. UV resistant and waterproof, this plant ties are made to last through multiple seasons. Designed from the ground up to meet gardeners' needs

🌿🌱🌴💐 PLASTIC COATING PROTECTS PLANTS - Discover this reusable garden solution for securing plants and garden structures, training vines, and more. The bendable wire inside holds its shape while the plastic coating is designed to be gentle on plants, making this plant wire perfect for repositioning as plants grow

🌿🌱🌴💐 STRONG, FLEXIBLE SUPPORT WIRE - Made from a unique flexible plastic compound and steel wire core gives it strength, and the outer coating of UV-stabilised compound cushions and protects plant stems. It is long-lasting, does not rot, and can be washed, reshaped and re-used. The plastic coating is particularly good when you are looking to disguise the use of the wire
🌿🌱🌴💐 DIMMENSIONS - Each roll contains 50m/164ft of garden wire. Wire thickness 1.4cm. Dispenser measures approx. 10cm. Fits in most pockets!
description: Product Description Secure Easy with a Twist For supporting young plants, these ties secure easily with a twist, eliminating the need for intricate knots. The integrated wire cutter enables effortless trimming, and adjusting for growing stems is quick with just a couple of twists. UV resistant and waterproof, these ties are durable across seasons, designed with gardeners' needs in mind for optimal functionality. Discover this reusable garden solution for securing plants and garden structures, training vines, and more. The bendable wire inside holds its shape while the plastic coating is designed to be gentle on plants, making this plant wire perfect for repositioning as plants grow. See More
